summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions iteration 11. All features verified working: 1) Paywall with Free/Pro/Enterprise tiers - Free tier badge visible in header, Leveranciers tab locked for Free users, Step 5 shows 'Upgrade naar Pro voor PDF export' button, upgrade modal with 3 plan options works correctly. 2) Rule-based AI recommendations working without GPT calls - returns sanitair, wifi, camera, slagboom, verlichting rules based on num_spots. 3) Travel costs in Step 5 correctly filtered to only show suppliers for categories with placed products. 4) 27 total products including new UniFi USW-Lite-8-PoE and UNVR Pro. 5) Flow filtering working: Recreatie=27 products (all categories), Chalet=24 (no slagboom), FEC=21 (no sanitair/douchelezer).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ health check returns 200
Backend: GET /api/products returns 27 total products
Backend: New UniFi USW-Lite-8-PoE product exists
Backend: New UniFi UNVR Pro product exists
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=recreatie returns 27 products (all 8 categories)
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=chalet returns 24 products (no slagboom)
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=fec returns 21 products (no sanitair, douchelezer)
Backend: POST /api/ai/recommendations returns rule-based recommendations
Backend: AI sanitair rule triggers for 30 spots with 0 sanitair
Backend: AI wifi rule triggers for 30 spots with 0 wifi
Backend: AI camera rule triggers when no cameras placed
Backend: AI slagboom rule triggers for parks >10 spots
Backend: AI verlichting rule triggers when no lighting placed
Backend: POST /api/quote/calculate travel_costs only includes placed product categories
Backend: Empty project has no travel costs
Backend: Multiple categories show multiple travel costs
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/match returns suppliers with travel info
Frontend: Flow Selector page loads with 3 flow buttons
Frontend: Free tier badge visible in header
Frontend: Leveranciers tab locked (disabled) for Free users
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Upgrade naar Pro voor PDF export' button when Free tier
Frontend: Upgrade modal opens with 3 plan options (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
Frontend: Selecting Pro plan unlocks PDF export button
Frontend: Selecting Pro plan shows 'Offerte downloaden (PDF)' button
Frontend: Chalet flow correctly filters out slagboom products
Frontend: FEC flow correctly filters out sanitair and douchelezer products
Frontend: Active flow label updates correctly (Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience)
Frontend: Product placement on canvas works
Frontend: Step 5 shows Reiskosten Leveranciers section with only placed product categories
Frontend: Travel costs show supplier name, category, distance, and cost
seed_data_creation: TEST_Paywall_Iteration11 and TEST_AI_Iteration11 projects created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified all new features: 1) Paywall system with Free/Pro/Enterprise tiers - userTier state starts as 'free', Free tier shows locked PDF button and disabled Leveranciers tab, Pro unlocks PDF export, Enterprise unlocks Leveranciers tab. Upgrade modal at data-testid='plan-free/pro/enterprise'. 2) Rule-based AI at POST /api/ai/recommendations returns recommendations based on num_spots without calling GPT - rules for sanitair (1 per 20 spots), wifi (1 per 30 spots), camera, slagboom (>10 spots), verlichting. 3) Travel costs in Step 5 now filtered to only show suppliers for categories with placed products - uses categoriesUsed set from placed_products. 4) 27 products total including new UniFi USW-Lite-8-PoE (wifi, budget tier) and UNVR Pro (camera, premium tier). 5) Flow filtering: FLOW_CATEGORIES dict in server.py - recreatie=all 8 categories, chalet=no slagboom, fec=no sanitair/douchelezer.
